creator: laszlo-rdr-keethu9thi@karolyi.hu
text:
(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #83)
One week has passed and still works like a charm. In fact for some reason, I see it being faster than the GENERIC re0 drivers, I see bigger throughput speeds in my munin charts.

At August 1st there will be another load test (another full backup) made from cron, I think if it doesn't crash then, we can consider the driver stable.
